assertions.text: [rubric-1] Greps for Task interface usage across the codebase
assertions.evidence: The agent explicitly mentions using `rg -n "\bTask\b" -g"*.ts"` to find references to the Task interface.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Greps for formatTask usage across the codebase
assertions.evidence: The agent explicitly mentions using `rg -n "formatTask" -g"*.ts"` to find call sites of the formatTask function.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Identifies all 3 consumers of formatTask (cli, api, reports)
assertions.evidence: The agent correctly identifies the usage of `formatTask` in `src/api/index.ts`, `src/cli/index.ts`, and `src/reports/summary.ts`.

assertions.text: [rubric-4] Flags any consumer that was not updated as a potential regression
assertions.evidence: The agent provides a list of all consumers and asks the user to double-check them, rather than actually inspecting the files to identify which ones were not updated (untouched) and flagging those specifically as regressions.
